root.sql:
select sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract as begining_of_contract_group ,pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract,'DD MONTH YYYY') as begining_of_contract ,pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract,'DD/MM/YYYY') as begining_of_contract_row ,pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract , 'MONTH YYYY') as begining_of_contract_month ,sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type_group ,count( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no) as c_count ,sum( sc_lon_m_contract.paid_first_amount) as c_app ,to_snumber((sum( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_approve_amount))::bigint) as c_app_1 ,sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type ,pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(current_date ,'DD MONTH YYYY') as sys_tdate
from sc_lon_m_contract ,sc_lon_m_loan_card ,sc_lon_m_rule
where sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no and sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type and (sc_lon_m_loan_card.close_status is null OR sc_lon_m_loan_card.close_status = '0')
/*WHERE*/
group BY sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract ,sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type_group ,sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type
